title: Beyond the Ocean
description: Minecraft: Beyond the Ocean is a story mod inspired by Subnautica, featuring  oceanthemed planets accessible through portals. Each planet presents unique challenges that players must overcome to progress
body:
Minecraft Beyond the Ocean is a Dimensions Mod currently featuring two dimensions. These are the Ocean Beyond and the Dark Ocean. The dimensions can be entered Through activating a portal Block that can be found in certain Structures. The two dimensions are Ocean themed and inspired by subnautica. There are dozens of new fish, some leviathan class creatures and some bosses. Also there are new technic blocks and machines that are powered with Redstone Flux. The dimensions are intended to be explored after the end so it adds a lot of hours to the endgame. Hope you enjoy the exploration and have fun discovering the mysterious and beautiful Oceanlife of Beyond the Ocean.  
Features:   
-2 New Dimensions  
-3 New Bossfights   
-4 Leviathan Class Creatures  
-Over 20 different types of sea creatures with texture variety  
-5 New Armor Sets  
-6 New Weapons    
-7 Terraria like Pets  
-A New Diving Gear Inventory    
-2 Vehicles  
-Redstone Flux compatible Blocks    
-Unique Charms  
-Over a Hundred new Buildingblocks
